props.name: className
props.description: A string of all className you want applied to the base component.

props.name: customTooltips
props.description: Enables custom html based tooltips instead of standard tooltips.

props.name: data
props.type: ChartData<keyof ChartTypeRegistry, (number | [number, number] | Point | BubbleDataPoint | null)[], unknown> | ((canvas: HTMLCanvasElement) => ChartData<...>)
props.description: The data object that is passed into the Chart.js chart (more info).

props.name: fallbackContent
props.description: A fallback for when the canvas cannot be rendered. Can be used for accessible chart descriptions.

props.name: getDatasetAtEvent
props.type: ((dataset: InteractionItem[], event: MouseEvent<HTMLCanvasElement, MouseEvent>) => void) | undefined
props.description: Proxy for Chart.js getDatasetAtEvent. Calls with dataset and triggering event.

props.name: getElementAtEvent
props.type: ((element: InteractionItem[], event: MouseEvent<HTMLCanvasElement, MouseEvent>) => void) | undefined
props.description: Proxy for Chart.js getElementAtEvent. Calls with single element array and triggering event.

props.name: getElementsAtEvent
props.type: ((elements: InteractionItem[], event: MouseEvent<HTMLCanvasElement, MouseEvent>) => void) | undefined
props.description: Proxy for Chart.js getElementsAtEvent. Calls with element array and triggering event.

props.name: height
props.description: Height attribute applied to the rendered canvas.

props.name: id
props.description: ID attribute applied to the rendered canvas.

props.name: options
props.type: _DeepPartialObject<CoreChartOptions<keyof ChartTypeRegistry> & ElementChartOptions<keyof ChartTypeRegistry> & PluginChartOptions<...> & DatasetChartOptions<...> & ScaleChartOptions<...>> | undefined
props.description: The options object that is passed into the Chart.js chart.

props.name: plugins
props.description: The plugins array that is passed into the Chart.js chart (more info)

props.name: redraw
props.description: If true, will tear down and redraw chart on all updates.

props.name: width
props.description: Width attribute applied to the rendered canvas.

props.name: wrapper
props.description: Put the chart into the wrapper div element.
